title: Thailand Trail: Islands, Cities & Culture
description: Embark on a comprehensive journey through Thailand’s most iconic landscapes. From the high-energy streets of the city to the tranquil vibes of tropical islands, this trail offers the perfect balance of adventure and relaxation.
inclusions: Half-Day Coral Island Tour (for groups of 4+)
highlights: 4 Nights in Phuket + 4 Nights in Pattaya
Free Half-Day Coral Island Tour
Daily Breakfast & Premium Hotel Stays
Private Guided Sightseeing

itinerary.title: Phuket Discovery
itinerary.description: Arrival in Phuket and transfer to your hotel. Spend 4 nights exploring the island's beaches and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Pattaya Vibes
itinerary.description: Transfer to Pattaya for 4 nights. Enjoy the vibrant coastal city spirit and attractions.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final breakfast and transfer to the airport for your journey home.

title: Phuket & Krabi: 5 Days of Paradise in Thailand
description: Double the paradise with this twin-island escape. Relax in the luxury of Fishermen’s Harbour in Phuket and the trendy Glow Ao Nang in Krabi. Explore crystal-clear lagoons and Maya Bay.
inclusions: Speedboat Tour to Phi Phi & Maya Bay
highlights: Speedboat Tour to Phi Phi & Maya Bay
Krabi Island Adventure: Koh Poda & Chicken Island
Phuket City Exploration: Old Town & Chalong Temple
Snorkel & Swim in crystal-clear waters

itinerary.title: Phuket Luxury
itinerary.description: Arrive in Phuket and stay at Fishermen’s Harbour. Explore Karon Viewpoint and Old Town.

itinerary.title: Phi Phi Islands
itinerary.description: Full day speedboat tour to Maya Bay, Monkey Beach, and snorkeling spots.

itinerary.title: Krabi Magic
itinerary.description: Transfer to Krabi. Island hop across Koh Poda and Phra Nang Cave Beach before departure.

title: Let’s Go Almaty: The Heart of Kazakhstan
description: Discover the stunning mountain scenery and modern charm of Almaty. From snow-capped peaks to vibrant city parks, Kazakhstan’s largest city is a hidden gem waiting to be explored.
highlights: Stunning mountain scenery and modern charm
Full Sightseeing & Transport Included
Daily Meals & Hotel Stay
Local Kazakh hospitality experience

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Meet and transfer to your hotel in Almaty. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Mountain & City
itinerary.description: Guided tours of the city parks and the snow-capped mountains of Kazakhstan.

itinerary.title: Heritage & Departure
itinerary.description: Explore cultural sites and local markets before the final airport transfer.

title: Yerevan: Culture, Mountains & Magic
description: Step into one of the world's oldest cities. Yerevan is a city of 'pink stone,' ancient history, and majestic views of Mount Ararat. Experience Armenian culture and cuisine.
highlights: Explore Republic Square and central Yerevan
Majestic views of Mount Ararat
Guided Cultural Sightseeing through 'Pink Stone' architecture
Authentic Armenian culinary experiences

itinerary.title: Heart of Yerevan
itinerary.description: Explore the soul of the city from Republic Square to historic districts.

itinerary.title: Mountain Landscapes
itinerary.description: Journey through the serene mountains surrounding the city.

itinerary.title: Farewell Yerevan
itinerary.description: Final morning in the city before transferring to the airport.

title: Thailand Trio: Phuket, Pattaya & Bangkok
description: The ultimate Thailand experience. This tour covers the sun-soaked shores of Phuket, the coastal energy of Pattaya, and the bustling metropolitan charm of Bangkok.
highlights: 2 Nights Phuket | 2 Nights Pattaya | 2 Nights Bangkok
Phuket Coastal Beauty and Patong Beach
Pattaya City Spirit and cultural attractions
Bangkok Discovery: Temples, Markets, and Malls

itinerary.title: Phuket Sun
itinerary.description: Relax on Patong beach and explore hidden gems of the island.

itinerary.title: Pattaya Spirit
itinerary.description: Transfer to Pattaya for seaside breeze and unique cultural sites.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Magic
itinerary.description: Conclude in the high-energy capital visiting temples and markets.

title: Pattaya Escape: 5 Days of Family Fun & Seaside Bliss
description: A dedicated 5-day retreat in Thailand’s favorite seaside city. Perfect for families and couples, this package focuses on sun-soaked beaches and relaxation.
inclusions: All Sightseeing as per the plan
highlights: 4 Nights in Pattaya
Visit Sanctuary of Truth and local temples
Relax on the golden sands of Jomtien Beach
Family-friendly parks and gardens exploration

itinerary.title: Check-in
itinerary.description: Arrival and transfer to your tropical home away from home.

itinerary.title: Seaside Bliss
itinerary.description: Beachside relaxation and water sports on Pattaya's famous coast.

itinerary.title: Explore & Depart
itinerary.description: Visit the Sanctuary of Truth before your final airport transfer.
